highlighted section  
the engineer models the query response time for each database as a function of the number of queries Q it handles  
mysql: tmysqlq = a · q² + b · e^{cq}  
oracle: toracleq = d · ln(q+1) + e/(q+1)  
sybase: tsybaseq = f · q^(3/2) - g · sqrt(q)  
total query response time function ttotalq = tmysqlq + toracleq + tsybaseq
